title_tag: Missouri Worker Classification State Test 2026 | Teamed
meta_description: Missouri worker classification 2026: IRS 20-factor common-law test for tax, ABC test for unemployment (RSMo § 288.034), strict Construction Worker Independent Contractor Act (RSMo § 285.500). Misclassification is a Class A misdemeanour.
hero_alt: Dusk silhouette of the Gateway Arch and St. Louis skyline reflected on the Mississippi River, Missouri.
primary_tests_covered: IRS 20-factor common-law test (state withholding + workers comp)
Construction Worker Independent Contractor Act RSMo §§ 285.500-285.515

RSMo §§ 285.500-285.515 — Construction Worker Independent Contractor Act
RSMo § 285.515 — Class A misdemeanour + $50/worker/day civil penalty
